title: NOC 41402 – Business Development Officers and Market Researchers and Analysts | GTR Immigration
description: Business Development Officers and Market Researchers and Analysts under NOC 41402 are strategic professionals who promote economic growth, analyze market trends, and support commercial development across Canada. Classified as TEER 1 (Professional Occupation), this role is essential in driving business expansion, investment attraction, and data-driven marketing strategies. These professionals work in government agencies, economic development offices, consulting firms, marketing analytics companies, and private corporations.

classification.teer: Classification LevelDetailsBroad Occupation Category4 – Occupations in education, law, and social, community and government servicesTEER1 – Occupations usually require a university degreeMajor Group41 – Professional occupations in law, education, social, community and government servicesSub-Major Group414 – Professional occupations in government servicesMinor Group4140 – Policy and program researchers, consultants and officersNOC Code41402

duties: Business Development Officers and Market Researchers perform some or all of the following duties:
Develop and administer programs to promote business investment
Design and implement market research questionnaires
Analyze consumer buying habits and preferences
Plan and coordinate economic development projects
Assess business opportunities and attract venture capital
Evaluate industrial and commercial development proposals
Provide advice on government approval processes
Analyze marketing campaigns and promotional strategies
Conduct competitor and market trend analysis
Provide consultation on starting and expanding businesses
Prepare detailed reports and research papers
employment_requirements: Certification may include:Certified Economic Developer (Ec.D.)Certified Marketing Research Professional (CMRP)
Experience in marketing analytics, economic development, or policy analysis is often required.
Foreign-trained professionals may require credential assessment for immigration purposes.
salary_prospects: Business Development Officers and Market Researchers typically earn between:
$42,400 – $126,800 per year,depending on sector, specialization, and seniority.
Senior consultants, economic advisors, and marketing strategists may earn significantly higher compensation.
job_outlook: The outlook for NOC 41402 is stable and competitive due to:
Increased reliance on market data analytics
Demand remains strong in urban centers and expanding regional economies.
labour_market_demand: Professionals under NOC 41402 are employed in:
Federal, provincial, and municipal government departments
Strong opportunities exist in Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec, and Nova Scotia.
Strong demand in public and private sectors
Opportunities in international trade and tourism
Career progression into senior management roles
Professionals with expertise in data analytics, digital marketing, and economic development are especially valued.
pathways: Advanced degrees and analytics expertise strengthen immigration competitiveness.
If you are a Business Development Officer or Market Research Analyst planning to build your career in Canada, contact GTR Immigration today to evaluate your immigration pathway.
